channel.title: sbomify · v26.1.0 – Licenses
channel.description: Recent content in Licenses on sbomify · v26.1.0

item.title: License Notices
item.description:
The following license notices apply to third-party components included in this release. Each component’s license text is linked to the canonical SPDX License List entry.

minio

ComponentVersionLicenseWebsite
busybox 1.37.0 GPL-2.0-only link
glibc 2.42 LGPL-2.0-or-later link

libidn2 2.3.8 GPL-2.0-or-later link
libunistring 1.4.1 LGPL-3.0-or-later link

xgcc 15.2.0 GPL-3.0-or-later link

item.title: Required Source Disclosure
item.description:
Required Source Disclosure

The following components are distributed under licenses that require us to make source code available. Links point to the exact source archives used in this release build.

Component Version License Source
audit 4.1.2 GPL-2.0-or-later source
bash-interactive 5.3p9 GPL-3.0-or-later source
busybox 1.37.0 GPL-2.0-only source
db 4.8.30 Sleepycat source
gcc 15.2.0 GPL-3.0-or-later source
glibc 2.42 LGPL-2.0-or-later source
keyutils 1.6.3 GPL-2.0-or-later source
libcap-ng 0.9 LGPL-2.1-only source
libidn2 2.3.8 GPL-2.0-or-later source
libunistring 1.4.1 LGPL-3.0-or-later source
libxcrypt 4.5.2 LGPL-2.1-or-later source
nss-cacert 3.121 MPL-2.0 source
readline 8.3p3 GPL-3.0-or-later source
xgcc 15.2.0 GPL-3.0-or-later source

All Other Components

Source URLs for all components (including permissively-licensed ones) are recorded in the CycloneDX SBOM under the externalReferences field with type distribution. Download the SBOM from the Dependencies section to access them.

All images are built using Nix derivations from pinned inputs, ensuring the source URL in the SBOM is the exact archive used in the build — not a “latest” pointer.

item.title: Exceptions
item.description:
The following components have no license information in their SBOM metadata. This is a compliance gap — until the license is identified, distribution obligations cannot be determined.

Component Version Image Notes
icu4c 76.1 postgres ICU license (Unicode-3.0) — SBOM metadata missing SPDX identifier
